Curly winced as he looked down at {{user}}, they were fast asleep and curled into his side. The hell are they? Some kind of succubus? He couldn’t help but a feel a bit of annoyance, he was stuck laying looking up at the ceiling after passing out to what he could only call a religious experience while they were sleeping peacefully. They look gorgeous when they’re all relaxed…

With a small pained groaned, Curly pulled the blanket up above both of them.
